text.value:
DELETE t
FROM hcAddress t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcStaffMember s
    JOIN tblMember m ON m.ID = s.tblMemberId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = m.accountInfoId
    JOIN Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE s.AddressId = t.id
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcFunder f
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = f.accountInfoId
    JOIN Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE f.AddressId = t.id
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcChildProfileContacts cpc
    JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cpc.childProfileId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = cp.accountInfoId
    JOIN Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE cpc.AddressId = t.id
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcChildProfileScheduleAssessment cpsa
    JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cpsa.childProfileId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = cp.accountInfoId
    JOIN Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE cpsa.AddressId = t.id
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcProviderLocation pl
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON pl.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE pl.AddressId = t.id
);
